header.title: Gurlan Global Teks — From Cotton Fields to Ready-to-Wear Products for Your Brand

s2.title: Key Metrics
texts: Gurlan Global Teks is a modern textile cluster that integrates every stage of production — from cultivating our own cotton to manufacturing finished garments. We control every micro-process, enabling us to guarantee raw material purity, color consistency, and transparent pricing without intermediaries.

Our ecosystem, with a capacity of 6 million garments per year, is tailored to meet the high standards of international retail. Through the implementation of innovative technologies and certifications such as SEDEX, OEKO-TEX, and ISO, we provide brands not only with high-quality manufacturing but also with full social and environmental responsibility.

stats.label: Fully vertically integrated textile manufacturing (full-cycle production)

label: OEKO-TEX, SEDEX, ISO.
BCI and Better Cotton — in progress

stats.label: Our core experience is focused on exporting to international markets
Dynamic growth and expansion into international markets

s3.title: Products
s3.subtitle: We produce high-quality textile products within a vertically integrated cluster. Control at every stage — from cotton seed to final garment packaging — allows us to ensure full compliance with international standards such as ISO and OEKO-TEX.

byType.title: Cotton
byType.desc: High-quality natural raw material grown in compliance with modern agricultural technologies and sustainable production standards.

byType.title: Yarn
byType.desc: Our production capacity reaches 4,000 tons of yarn per year. We use advanced technologies from global industry leaders — Trützschler, Rieter, Zinser, and Saurer — enabling us to produce high-quality yarn using both ring spinning (KD) and open-end (OE) spinning methods.

byType.title: Dyeing & Finishing
byType.desc: The dyeing facility has a capacity of 3,500 tons of fabric per year. We use advanced equipment from Dilmenler, along with technologies from leading brands such as Corino, Ferraro, and Odesi. This ensures excellent color fastness, softness, and durability of knitted fabrics.

byType.title: Fabrics
byType.desc: Our knitting department is equipped with high-tech machinery from global leaders including Mayer, Orizio, Pilotelli, and Vilike. The annual production capacity reaches 300 tons of high-quality knitted fabric.

byType.title: Finished Products
byType.desc: Our factory produces up to 6,000,000 finished garments per year, ensuring stable supply for large-scale retail.

solutions.title: Строительство
solutions.desc: Мы предлагаем как готовые архитектурно-строительные системы, так и нестандартные решения под нужды заказчика

solutions.title: Инфраструктура
solutions.desc: КраМЗ — первый среди производителей алюминиевых мостов и инфраструктурных решений

solutions.title: Транспорт
solutions.desc: Продукция КраМЗ активно применяется для производства широкого спектра транспортных средств

solutions.title: Комфортная среда
solutions.desc: Завод производит и поставляет продукцию для благоустройства городской и загородной среды

s4.title: Advantages
s4.text: Gurlan Global Teks brings together advanced technology, deep expertise, and a strategic approach to build a strong and sustainable competitive advantage in the global market.

stats.title: Full-Cycle Production
stats.label: Vertical integration — from cotton to finished products with quality control at every stage.

stats.title: High Quality
stats.label: Modern equipment and standards ensure consistency and compliance with international requirements.

stats.title: Export-Oriented
stats.label: Strong international partnerships and extensive experience in global markets.

stats.title: Reliable Partnership
stats.label: Long-term relationships built on trust and commitment.

stats.title: Innovation & Development
stats.label: Implementation of advanced technologies and continuous optimization of production processes.

stats.title: Sustainable Production
stats.label: Environmental responsibility and efficient use of resources.

s5.title: ГЕОГРАФИЯ ЭКСПОРТА
s5.text: Мы поставляем продукцию на международные рынки, выстраивая устойчивые партнёрские отношения и расширяя географию присутствия.

tabData.title: Ключевой экспортный рынок текстильной продукции
tabData.description: Крупнейший университетский комплекс Сибири. При строительстве применялись фасадные алюминиевые системы КраМЗа, обеспечивающие высокую теплоизоляцию и долговечность в условиях сибирского климата.

tabData.title: Стабильное партнёрство и регулярные поставки
tabData.description: Многофункциональный спортивный комплекс, рассчитанный на проведение соревнований международного уровня.

s6.title: WHY CHOOSE US
s6.text: We ensure full quality control at every stage — from cotton cultivation to the production of finished garments. Our factory has a production capacity of 6,000,000 units per year. Our manufacturing is certified in accordance with international standards such as ISO, OEKO-TEX, and SEDEX. Our in-house spinning and dyeing facilities allow us to guarantee consistent fabric quality and performance. We use modern equipment from leading global technology providers. Production lead times are guaranteed and range from 7 to 35 business days. For orders starting from one full truckload, we cover all delivery costs to your warehouse. Our CMT (Cut, Make, Trim) service model provides flexibility to meet your specific business requirements. We offer transparent partnerships built on reliability and long-term cooperation.

s7.title: WE VALUE EVERY ONE OF OUR PARTNERS
